calendar.matters:
Order Sustaining Demurrer Without Leave To Amend
Off Calendar Oct-15-2007 Affirmed
MINI MINUTES: appellant attorney, paul utrecht, present. respondent attorney, dean preston, present. matter submitted.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dean Preston and Raquel Fox of the Tenderloin Housing Clinic, 771-9850, appearing for defendants and moving parties
Andrew M. Zacks of Zacks Utrecht & Leadbetter, 956-8100, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court took DEFENDANTS HECTOR GARCIA, AMPARO GARCIA and ROMULO GARCIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT under submission. Each side submitted a proposed form of order for the Court's consideration. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Consolidating Cases
Off Calendar Dec-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS JOE CHAN and ALDA CHAN'S Motion For Order Consolidating Cases is denied for failure to comply with CRC 367(a) without prejudice to renewal. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
